summary: Credit-based payment system for 'mumble' language tutor - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend Razorpay integration verified with correct $14.99 and $29.99 prices. Frontend pricing section, auth redirect flow, /pricing page, and sidebar pricing links all working correctly.

landing_page_pricing_section.details: All 3 cards visible with correct prices ($0, $14.99, $29.99) and credit amounts

landing_page_redirect_flow.free_plan_click: PASSED - Redirects to /auth when not logged in

auth_redirect_preservation.details: Auth page preserves redirect and plan query params, redirects to /pricing?plan=plus after login

pricing_page_inapp.all_cards_visible: PASSED - Free, Plus, Pro cards displayed
pricing_page_inapp.current_plan_badge: PASSED - Shows 'CURRENT PLAN' badge on Free plan

razorpay_checkout_integration.details: Razorpay modal auto-triggers when navigating to /pricing?plan=plus after login

sidebar_pricing_link_expanded.details: Pricing link visible in expanded sidebar, navigates to /pricing

sidebar_pricing_link_collapsed.details: CreditCard icon visible in collapsed sidebar, navigates to /pricing

sidebar_pricing_link_mobile.details: Pricing link visible in mobile sidebar, navigates to /pricing

features_verified: Landing page pricing section shows 3 plans with $14.99 and $29.99 prices
Clicking Plus/Pro on landing page when NOT logged in: redirects to /auth?redirect=/pricing&plan={plan}
Clicking Free plan on landing page when NOT logged in: redirects to /auth
Auth page preserves redirect and plan query params after login
/pricing page displays all 3 plans with correct prices and credit counts
/pricing page shows 'Current Plan' badge on the user's current plan (free by default)
/pricing page shows '50 credits remaining' in header for free users
GET /api/payments/plans returns correct plans with $14.99 and $29.99
GET /api/payments/subscription returns user subscription (defaults to free)
POST /api/payments/create-order creates Razorpay order for plus/pro
Sidebar has Pricing link in expanded, collapsed, and mobile states
Razorpay checkout modal auto-opens when plan param is present in URL
critical_code_review_comments: CORRECT: payments.py has proper PLANS dictionary with free ($0), plus ($14.99), pro ($29.99)
CORRECT: create-order endpoint rejects free plan with 400
CORRECT: Razorpay order uses USD currency with amount in smallest unit ($14.99 = 149900)
CORRECT: LandingPage.js PricingCard routes based on auth state (free->auth, paid->auth?redirect=/pricing&plan=x)
CORRECT: AuthPage.js preserves redirect and plan query params, builds afterAuthPath correctly
CORRECT: PricingPage.js auto-triggers checkout when plan param present and subscription loaded
CORRECT: All pricing cards have data-testid attributes (pricing-card-{id}, pricing-btn-{id})
CORRECT: Sidebar.jsx has Pricing link in expanded, collapsed, and mobile sidebars with data-testid
CORRECT: api.js has getPlans, getSubscription, createOrder functions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment system v2 complete. Razorpay integration working with correct prices ($14.99 Plus, $29.99 Pro). Landing page pricing buttons route correctly based on auth state. Auth page preserves redirect/plan params. /pricing page shows current plan badge and credits remaining. Sidebar has Pricing link in all states. Note: Razorpay modal opens successfully but actual payment completion cannot be automated in test mode.
